name: Red Diodebot
tips: Red Diodebot tutors Green Diodebot on play, starting the Diodebot chain. Playing any one Diodebot guarantees you draw the next one.
The chain cycle is Red → Green → Blue → Red. Each one tutors the next, ensuring you never run out of Robots in hand.
At 12/12 for 2 mana, the stats are decent but the real value is deck thinning. Each Diodebot played pulls another card, accelerating your draws.
The tutored Robots fuel RGB Lasercannon's discard cost (2 Robots). Play a Diodebot to tutor another, then discard both for Lasercannon.
In a Robot deck, lead with whichever Diodebot you draw first — the chain ensures you'll see all three regardless of draw order.
